title: A Farewell by Amy Levy — Love Poetry Lines
content:
(After Heine.)


The sad rain falls from Heaven,
A sad bird pipes and sings ;
I am sitting here at my window
And watching the spires of "King's."
meaning: "A Farewell" by Amy Levy is a love and nature poem consisting of 22 lines. The poet explores themes of love and nature through vivid imagery and emotional depth. Beginning with "(After Heine.) ...", this piece captures the essence of human experience and invites reflection on the deeper currents of life and feeling. This work is part of Amy Levy's celebrated body of poetry that continues to resonate with readers worldwide.
